name: python3-sphinx-rtd-theme
title: python3-sphinx-rtd-theme
description:
sphinx theme from readthedocs.org (Python 3)
This mobile-friendly sphinx theme was initially created for readthedocs.org,
but can be incorporated in any project.
.
Among other things, it features a left panel with a browseable table of
contents, and a search bar.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sphinx-rtd-theme because sphinx theme from readthedocs.org (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sphinx-rtd-theme as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sphinx-rtd-theme with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sphinx-rtd-theme --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
